top_signals.title: UAE's exit from OPEC+ reduced the group's share of crude oil production and capacity
top_signals.summary: On April 28, 2026, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced that it was leaving OPEC, effective on May 1. OPEC was formed in 1960 by Iraq, Iran, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela, with the stated objective to "coordinate and unify petroleum policies among Member Countries." OPEC is best known for its effect on global crude oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin rally cools as investors digest inflation data, oil clouds outlook
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: UK financial regulators to begin overseeing Critical Third Parties announced by HM Treasury
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England, the Prudential Regulation Authority and the Financial Conduct Authority will start overseeing the first Critical Third Parties on Monday 13 July 2026, following designation by HM Treasury.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/07 -  Bank of England Levy: Notification Document Levy Year 2026/27
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder

top_signals.title: Trump's attorney general nominee Todd Blanche faces Senate Judiciary questions
top_signals.summary: Todd Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Donald Trump.

top_signals.title: Commissioner's Roswall speech at the United Nations High-Level Meeting on Critical Energy Transition Minerals, New York
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech New York, 14 Jul 2026 Thank you, Madam Deputy Secretary-General, Excellencies, ladies and gentlemen.
Let me begin by thanking the United Nations for convening this important meeting ...

top_signals.title: Finland issues wanted notice for hacker behind massive psychotherapy data breach
top_signals.summary: The defendant's lawyer told Finnish media that he does not know where his client is but believes Kivimäki is outside Finland.
